title: Friday Night Lights
description: A sports set centered on anticipation and collision under harsh stadium lighting.

photos.title: Kickoff Hang Time
photos.alt: A stylized sports placeholder showing a football kickoff under stadium lights.
photos.caption: The whole field seems to hold still for a split second once the ball leaves the foot.

photos.title: Sideline Surge
photos.alt: A stylized sports placeholder of players accelerating along a football sideline at night.
photos.caption: The sideline compresses everything into a single channel of motion.
